pageContent: Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 1  PALM INFOTECH  More Than Quality, It's Our Signature  Your custom tech experience creator is just a nudge away.  Plain Text Edition  This version presents the original content in a simple, single-column reading order for reliable text extraction.

Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 2  Palm Infotech - At A Glance  At Palm Infotech, we don't just build apps, we help you shape digital experiences. We listen closely to your ideas, add clarity with our expertise, and address challenges upfront to deliver products that are built for today and ready for tomorrow. Global Reach: USA, UK, UAE, Australia, South Africa, Canada, Austria, India. Our Approach  Every project is driven by structure, discipline, and ownership. We don't just deliver what is asked; we guide, advise, and lead the project with the client's long-term success in mind. Founded (April 2021)  Started in April 2021 with a mission to connect people and create meaningful digital experiences. 40+ Professionals Team  A skilled team of designers, developers, and creators building user-focused digital solutions. 120+ Apps Delivered  Over 120 successful apps launched across industries, turning ideas into real-world success.

team of designers, developers, and creators building user-focused digital solutions. 120+ Apps Delivered  Over 120 successful apps launched across industries, turning ideas into real-world success. 50K+ Work Hours  50,000+ hours dedicated to building seamless, high-impact digital products. What we do at Palm Infotech  How We Work  We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Every solution is tailored, with functionality, scalability, and user experience kept at the core. Core Expertise  IT Consulting  Web Application & Custom Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native)  Extended Capabilities  UI/UX Design  Quality Assurance & Testing  Maintenance & Post Launch Support  Resource Augmentation

Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 3  From First Conversation To Project Kick-Off  01. Requirement Gathering  Through discussions and shared documents.  02. Understanding Document & Queries  Clarifications from our side.  03. Rough Estimation & Timeline  Initial cost and schedule.  04. Proposal Draft & Feedback  Review and refine together.  05. Final Estimation & Agreement  Scope, cost, and payment defined.  06. Kick-Off  We start once aligned and confirmed.  The Team Behind Your Project  Full-Stack Developer  Dedicated - The backbone of development, ensuring robust and scalable solutions.  Designer  Dedicated until finalized - Ensures seamless UI/UX that delights users.  Business Analyst  Partial - Prepares user stories and clarifies business logic.  Team Leader  Partial - Ensures best practices and provides technical guidance.  Quality Assurance  Partial - Validates and tests every feature for perfection.  Project Manager  Partial - Tracks progress and maintains clear communication.  *Team size can scale up or down depending on project needs, ensuring optimal resource allocation.*

Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 4  Development Process - Role Matrix  We run every project with a structured process and a balanced team setup. Each role contributes at the right stage. The result: a reliable build, efficient communication, and controlled costs. Requirement Detailing  Business Analyst:   Gather requirements, clarify gaps. Team Lead / PM:   Confirm scope, align timelines. Design  Business Analyst:   Validate logic. Designer:   Create UI/UX screens from client input. Team Lead / PM:   Ensure client approval, manage feedback. Development  Business Analyst:   Share user stories. Designer:   Provide design assets. Developer:   Build features and integrations. QA:   Prepare test cases. Team Lead / PM:   Oversee code quality, track progress. Testing  Business Analyst:   Check functional flows. Developer:   Fix reported bugs. QA:   Run test cases, validate features. Team Lead / PM:   Review QA reports, prioritize fixes.

track progress. Testing  Business Analyst:   Check functional flows. Developer:   Fix reported bugs. QA:   Run test cases, validate features. Team Lead / PM:   Review QA reports, prioritize fixes. Client Review  Business Analyst:   Demo walk-through. Designer:   Explain design logic if needed. Developer:   Support bug fixes. QA:   Confirm bug free build. Team Lead / PM:   Manage communication and ensure clarity. Launch  Business Analyst:   Confirm final requirements. Designer:   Provide final design assets. Developer:   Prepare deployment build. QA:   Final regression testing. Team Lead / PM:   Handle app store submissions, updates.

Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 5  Palm Infotech - Competitive Edge  01. Structure & Discipline  We treat every project with the same rigor, ensuring consistent quality and delivery standards across all engagements. 02. Ownership Mindset  We own our work, not just code it. Every line of code, every design decision is made with your success in mind. 03. Proactive Risk Management  We flag risks early, suggest better approaches, and keep long-term goals in sight to prevent costly surprises. 04. Balanced Expertise  We balance client vision with our expertise, so solutions are both creative and practical, meeting real-world needs. 05. Trust Through Transparency  We believe trust is built on clarity, consistency, and complete delivery. No hidden surprises, just honest communication. Palm Infotech - Portfolio Highlights  We've built 120+ apps in 4 years, across industries and geographies.

clarity, consistency, and complete delivery. No hidden surprises, just honest communication. Palm Infotech - Portfolio Highlights  We've built 120+ apps in 4 years, across industries and geographies. Here's a glimpse into our recent and impactful projects:  A lifestyle and loyalty-driven food & beverage app. Features ordering, rewards, wallet, gamification, and store locator. An adaptive IBS-FODMAP app that personalizes the entire diet journey. Expert guidance and smart testing help users discover what they can eat with confidence. A fantasy sports app with real-time match integration, leaderboards, and wallet withdrawals. A dating and social experience app designed for real-life meetups, event creation, and authentic connections. A financial super app in Myanmar. First client since our inception; we've been continuously enhancing it since 2021.

Palm Infotech Overview - Plain Text Edition   Page 6  Palm Infotech - Portfolio Highlights (continued)  Discover real projects and startups shared by founders and teams. Connect, collaborate, and explore opportunities that match your interests. Milk Teas | Smoothies | Shakes  Slush | Juice | And More!  order now | past orders  Loyalty | inbox | gift cards | Feedback | more  Fusing ancient Vedic wisdom with AI to decode palm and planetary influences. Gain meaningful guidance for self-reflection, balance, and spiritual growth. Wonder App  Discover. Connect. Thrive. Connect with people nearby in real time based on location and shared interests. Chat, meet, and build trust through ratings, feedback, and verified interactions. Manage sales teams, orders, and performance in real time. Track progress, collaborate instantly, and drive productivity anywhere. Domestic Clients  Merci Global - Client: Gagan Raj. Sleep Guardian - Client: Akshay Korat. Triple D - Client: Nishant Parvadia.
